query:
ALTER TABLE users
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `plan` ENUM('free','pro','enterprise') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'free',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `subscriptionExpiry` TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `subscriptionStatus` ENUM('ACTIVE','CANCELED','PAST_DUE','TRIALING','NONE') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'NONE',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `subscriptionId` VARCHAR(255) NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `credits` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `lastResetDate` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `onboardingCompleted` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;
command:

ALTER TABLE users
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `plan` ENUM('free','pro','enterprise') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'free',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `subscriptionExpiry` TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `subscriptionStatus` ENUM('ACTIVE','CANCELED','PAST_DUE','TRIALING','NONE') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'NONE',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `subscriptionId` VARCHAR(255) NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `credits` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `lastResetDate` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `onboardingCompleted` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;
